mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, NICKNAME, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETED_AT FROM USERS WHERE EMAIL = #{email} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
SELECT USER_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD_HASH, NICKNAME, ROLE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT, DELETED_AT FROM USERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
